mapper.select: SELECT t1.category_id, t1.category_code, t1.category_name, t1.spec, t1.model, t1.material, t1.size, t1.size_unit_id, t1.measure_unit_id, t1.use_range, t1.warehouse_id, t1.purchase_price, t1.sale_price, t1.supplier_id, t1.image_url, t1.status, t1.create_by, -- 关联供应商名称 t2.supplier_name FROM asset_category AS t1 LEFT JOIN asset_supplier AS t2 ON t1.supplier_id = t2.supplier_id ${ew.customSqlsegment}
